languages.text: "Вот и она, Лорд-капитан... Бог-Император защити, впервые вижу ее так близко". {n}Капитан Дунавски смотрит на чудовище со смесью ужаса и восхищения.{/n} "Я вижу два подхода. Один к цветку, второй — к наросту. Первый исторгает ядовитый дым, а второй плодит хищных мух. Я видела как они объедают руку до костей за полминуты. С какой стороны прикажете заходить, Ваша Светлость?"

"There it is, Lord Captain... God-Emperor protect us, this is the first time I've ever seen it this close." {n}Captain Dunawski regards the monstrosity with mingled terror and fascination.{/n} "I see two lines of attack. One to the flower, the other to the growth. The flower sprays poisonous pollen, while the growth spews out flesh-eating flies. Which approach do you want me to take, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}?"
languages.original_text: "Вот и она, Лорд-капитан... Бог-Император защити, впервые вижу ее так близко". {n}Капитан Дунавски смотрит на чудовище со смесью ужаса и восхищения.{/n} "Я вижу два подхода. Один к цветку, второй — к наросту. Первый исторгает ядовитый дым, а второй плодит хищных мух. Я видела как они объедают руку до костей за полминуты. С какой стороны прикажете заходить, Ваша Светлость?"

traits.locale_text: "There it is, Lord Captain... God-Emperor protect us, this is the first time I've ever seen it this close." {n}Captain Dunawski gazes at the monstrosity with mingled terror and fascination.{/n} "I see two lines of attack. One to the flower, the other to the growth. The flower sprays poisonous pollen, and the growth spews out flesh-eating flies. Which approach do you want me to take, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}?"

"There it is, Lord Captain... God-Emperor protect us, this is the first time I've ever seen it this close." {n}Captain Dunawski regards the monstrosity with mingled terror and fascination.{/n} "I see two lines of attack. One to the flower, the other to the growth. The flower sprays poisonous pollen, while the growth spews out flesh-eating flies. Which approach do you want me to take, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}?"

"There it is, Lord Captain... God-Emperor protect us, this is the first time I've ever seen it this close." {n}Captain Dunawski wrinkles her nose in disgust.{/n} "I see two lines of attack. One to the flower, the other to the growth. Our intelligence says that the flower intermittently sprays everything with poisonous pollen, and the growth swells and spews out flesh-eating flies. Which approach do you want me to take, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}?"

"There it is, Lord Captain... God-Emperor protect us, this is the first time I've ever seen it this close." {n}Captain Dunawski gazes at the monstrosity with mingled terror and fascination.{/n} "I see two lines of attack. One to the flower, the other to the growth. The flower sprays poisonous pollen, and the growth spews out flesh-eating flies. Which approach do you want me to take, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}?"

God-Emperor protect us, this is the first time I've ever seen it this close." {n}Captain Dunawski regards the monstrosity with mingled terror and fascination.{/n} "I see two lines of attack. One to the flower, the other to the growth. The flower sprays poisonous pollen, while the growth spews out flesh-eating flies. Which approach do you want me to take, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}?"

languages.text: 「ここにあります、艦長様…神皇帝が我々を守ってください、これほど近くで見たのは初めてです。」{n}ダンフスキー艦長は鼻をひねって嫌悪感を露わにする。{/n}「攻撃のルートは2つあります。花と成長への攻撃です。我々の情報では、花は毒性の花粉を時折放ち、成長は膨らんで肉食のハエを吐き出すと言われています。どちらのルートで進めばよいでしょうか、艦長様？」
languages.original_text: "There it is, Lord Captain... God-Emperor protect us, this is the first time I've ever seen it this close." {n}Captain Dunawski wrinkles her nose in disgust.{/n} "I see two lines of attack. One to the flower, the other to the growth. Our intelligence says that the flower intermittently sprays everything with poisonous pollen, and the growth swells and spews out flesh-eating flies. Which approach do you want me to take, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}?"

traits.locale_text: 「ここにあります、艦長様…神皇帝が我々を守ってください、これほど近くで見たのは初めてです。」{n}ダンフスキー艦長は鼻をひねって嫌悪感を露わにする。{n}「攻撃のルートは2つあります。花と成長への攻撃です。我々の情報では、花は毒性の花粉を時折放ち、成長は膨らんで肉食のハエを吐き出すと言われています。どちらのルートで進めばよいでしょうか、艦長様？」

languages.text: "İşte orada Lord Kaptan... Tanrı İmparator bizi korusun, bunu ilk kez bu kadar yakından görüyorum." {n}Yüzbaşı Dunawski, dehşet ve hayranlık karışımı bir ifadeyle bakıyor.{/n} "İki saldırı hattı görüyorum. Biri çiçeğe, diğeri ura doğru. Çiçek zehirli polen püskürtüyor, ursa et yiyen sinekler kusuyor. Hangi yoldan gitmemi istersiniz {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri?"
languages.original_text: "There it is, Lord Captain... God-Emperor protect us, this is the first time I've ever seen it this close." {n}Captain Dunawski regards the monstrosity with mingled terror and fascination.{/n} "I see two lines of attack. One to the flower, the other to the growth. The flower sprays poisonous pollen, while the growth spews out flesh-eating flies. Which approach do you want me to take, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}?"

traits.locale_text: "İşte orada Lord Kaptan... Tanrı İmparator bizi korusun, bunu ilk kez bu kadar yakından görüyorum." {n}Yüzbaşı Dunawski, dehşet ve hayranlık karışımı bir ifadeyle bakıyor.{/n} "İki saldırı hattı görüyorum. Biri çiçeğe, diğeri ura doğru. Çiçek zehirli polen püskürtüyor, ursa et yiyen sinekler kusuyor. Hangi yoldan gitmemi istersiniz {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri?"

languages.text: «Ahí está, Lord Capitán... Que el Dios Emperador nos ampare, es la primera vez que lo veo tan de cerca». {n}La capitana Dunawski mira con una mezcla de terror y fascinación la abominación.{/n} «Distingo dos posibles vías de ataque. Una lleva hasta la flor, la otra hasta el brote. La flor emite rociadas de polen ponzoñoso, mientras que el brote escupe moscas que devoran la carne. ¿Qué camino quiere que siga, mi{mf|lord|lady}?».
languages.original_text: "There it is, Lord Captain... God-Emperor protect us, this is the first time I've ever seen it this close." {n}Captain Dunawski regards the monstrosity with mingled terror and fascination.{/n} "I see two lines of attack. One to the flower, the other to the growth. The flower sprays poisonous pollen, while the growth spews out flesh-eating flies. Which approach do you want me to take, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}?"

traits.locale_text: «Ahí está, Lord Capitán... Que el Dios Emperador nos ampare, es la primera vez que lo veo tan de cerca». {n}La capitana Dunawski mira con una mezcla de terror y fascinación la abominación.{/n} «Distingo dos posibles vías de ataque. Una lleva hasta la flor, la otra hasta el brote. La flor emite rociadas de polen ponzoñoso, mientras que el brote escupe moscas que devoran la carne. ¿Qué camino quiere que siga, mi{mf|lord|lady}?».

languages.text: “就在那儿，舰长大人……神皇保佑，这还是我第一次如此近距离地观察它。”{n}杜纳芙斯卡上尉看着那头怪物，既恐惧又着迷。{/n}“我观察到两条进攻路线。一条通往那朵花，另一条通往那个增生体。那朵花会喷洒有毒花粉，而增生体则会喷出食肉蝇。大人，您希望我走哪条路线？”
languages.original_text: "There it is, Lord Captain... God-Emperor protect us, this is the first time I've ever seen it this close." {n}Captain Dunawski regards the monstrosity with mingled terror and fascination.{/n} "I see two lines of attack. One to the flower, the other to the growth. The flower sprays poisonous pollen, while the growth spews out flesh-eating flies. Which approach do you want me to take, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}?"

traits.locale_text: “就在那儿，舰长大人……神皇保佑，这还是我第一次如此近距离地观察它。”{n}杜纳芙斯卡上尉看着那头怪物，既恐惧又着迷。{/n}“我观察到两条进攻路线。一条通往那朵花，另一条通往那个增生体。那朵花会喷洒有毒花粉，而增生体则会喷出食肉蝇。大人，您希望我走哪条路线？”

languages.text: « Nous y voilà, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}... L'Empereur-Dieu nous garde, c'est la première fois que je vois cette horreur d'aussi près, » {n}déclare la capitaine Dunawski en observant la monstruosité avec un mélange de terreur et de fascination.{/n} « Deux angles d'attaque possibles : cibler la fleur ou bien l'excroissance. La première libère du pollen toxique, tandis que la seconde crache des mouches dévoreuses de chair. Quelle approche souhaitez-vous que j'adopte, Votre Seigneurie ? »
languages.original_text: "There it is, Lord Captain... God-Emperor protect us, this is the first time I've ever seen it this close." {n}Captain Dunawski regards the monstrosity with mingled terror and fascination.{/n} "I see two lines of attack. One to the flower, the other to the growth. The flower sprays poisonous pollen, while the growth spews out flesh-eating flies. Which approach do you want me to take, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}?"

traits.locale_text: « Nous y voilà, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}... L'Empereur-Dieu nous garde, c'est la première fois que je vois cette horreur d'aussi près, » {n}déclare la capitaine Dunawski en observant la monstruosité avec un mélange de terreur et de fascination.{/n} « Deux angles d'attaque possibles : cibler la fleur ou bien l'excroissance. La première libère du pollen toxique, tandis que la seconde crache des mouches dévoreuses de chair. Quelle approche souhaitez-vous que j'adopte, Votre Seigneurie ? »

languages.text: "Da ist er, Lord Captain ... Der Gottimperator schütze uns, das ist das erste Mal, dass ich ihm so nahe komme." {n}Captain Dunawski betrachtet die Monstrosität mit einer Mischung aus Entsetzen und Faszination.{/n} "Ich sehe zwei Angriffslinien. Die Blume oder den Auswuchs. Die Blume stößt giftige Pollen aus, der Auswuchs Fleisch fressende Fliegen. Wie soll ich vorgehen, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}?"
languages.original_text: "There it is, Lord Captain... God-Emperor protect us, this is the first time I've ever seen it this close." {n}Captain Dunawski regards the monstrosity with mingled terror and fascination.{/n} "I see two lines of attack.
